name: Swandor Cam Ranh Resort-Ultra All Inclusive
detail: only one all exclusive resort in nha trang. enough to have meal and drinks all day long. private beach, 5 pools, rooms which are good condition, area for kids, concert every night. perfect.
area: Cam Hải Đông,Nha Trang - View on map

name: Aquamarine Cam Ranh By Swandor - All Inclusive
detail: The hotel rooms are clean, airy and modern.
area: Cam Hải Đông,Nha Trang - View on map

name: Panorama Nha Trang Star Beach
detail: Star Beach is one of best accommodations i've been stayed in my trip around Viet Nam. Warming and welcome staff, they are helped me everything and suggest for me some useful tip for live in Nha Trang. The staff speak english good as well. The room very clean with nice sea view from bedroom. Great pool with excellent service. I'ill definitely stay here again next time.
area: Loc Tho,Nha Trang - View on map

name: Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang
detail: Thankyou to all the beautiful staff for a lovely stay. I made the booking not knowing much about the place as it had not yet opened. On arrival I was amazed at the beautiful hotel that we had chosen. Great location, friendly staff, amazing breakfast, beautiful facilities. Hotel was great even with young kids thanks to the kids club- which we didn’t actually use much as there was a kids play centre in the shopping centre next door that ended up being more convenient for where we were at the time. Also the swimming pool. Only recommendations would be to have some dishwashing liquid so we could do our own dishes, ie kids cups/drink bottles spoons etc. and heating for he pool- it was pretty chilly in there! Other thing to note was that the street noise is quite loud- fine if you sleep well, which luckily we do (in saying that though we were there for 4 nights over NYE, so was probably louder at bat time of year). Thankyou again, I hope we get come back and stay in the future.
area: Loc Tho,Nha Trang - View on map

name: Kymodo Panorama Apartment
detail: Really comfortable with the room. Clean and tidy beds. Fantastic balcony with ocean view. Will come back if I visit Nha Trang one day.
area: Loc Tho,Nha Trang - View on map

name: Holi Panorama Condotel
detail: Unbeatable location. 1 minute from the beach, all you have to do is cross the street. Beautiful panoramic view of the entire Nha Trang bay (I had Premium Ocean Front Suite, highly recommend you get a unit facing the ocean). Clean, modern room and wonderful big balcony to enjoy the view and breeze. Staff is helpful. And plenty of good local and international food w/in walking distance
area: Loc Tho,Nha Trang - View on map

name: Liberty Central Nha Trang Hotel
detail: This is a very nice new hotel in Nha Trang with a very good price. We booked a Club Executive room with a nice layout and a lot of windows (however just one small view to ocean while the hotel located behide other high buildings). We was informed that the access to Club lounge that included in our booking was available only on 2 days while they will close it forever on March 1. However it was a pleasure stay with nice staffs. There were two minus points from this hotel: 1. room cleaning was not 100% done while used tea cups were not cleaned or replace. 2. Too many Chinese visitors staying here that made this hotel became noisy and down-graded while they always NOT being polite at all in morning breakfast, in using elevators...
area: Loc Tho,Nha Trang - View on map

name: Radisson Blu Resort Cam Ranh
detail: Tôi biết tới tên Radission Blu vì ấn tượng tốt mà KS đã để lại sau một chuyến đi châu Âu. Lần này biết Radission Blu Cam Ranh vừa xây dựng đang vắng khách vì Covid. Chúng tôi đã bay tới Cam Ranh và ở đây từ 6-10/7/2020. Tôi đã từng ở nhiều khách sạn khu vực Cam Ranh. Nhưng đây là khách sạn tốt nhất so với các khách sạn 5* mà tôi từng ở. Mọi dịch vụ đều rất chuyên nghiệp. Ăn sáng rất tốt. Các món ăn đựơc chế biến tinh tế. Ăn tối ở nhà hàng sát bờ biển cũng khá ngon. Sạch sẽ, yên tĩnh, khác hẳn với Cam Ranh và Nha Trang đầy khách TQ ồn ào trước Covid! Giá phòng còn rất rẻ có lẽ do chưa có nhiều khách. Nếu bạn nào muốn nghỉ dưỡng, yên tĩnh, thưởng thức một buổi sáng vừa ăn sáng vừa nghỉ ngơi cho tới khi muốn trở lại phòng taa5i khu vực Cam Ranh, thì thời gian này chọn Radission Blu là rất thích hợp. We know the name of Radission Blu a couple years ago when we travel to Europe and stayed in a Radission Blu in Warsaw. We decided to stay in Radission Blu Cam Ranh because its name and the hotel has just been build in Cam Ranh Resort Area. We stayed here from 6-10 July 2020. We used to stay in many Cam Ranh area hotels. We can say this is the best hotel compared to the 5 * hotels that we've ever stayed in. All services are very professional. Breakfast was very good. Dinner at the beachfront restaurant is also quite delicious. The hotel is very clean, quiet, different from Cam Ranh and Nha Trang full of noisy Chinese guests before Covid! Room rates are still very good probably due to not many guests b/c Covid. If you want to fully enjoy your holiday, then it is best decision to choose Radission Blu Cam Ranh by this time.
area: Cam Hải Đông,Nha Trang - View on map

name: Virgo Hotel
detail: Big thanks to Quỳnh in the reception for always making me feel welcome and greeting me with the biggest smiles. I will definitely stay here again. We got room on 16th floor with the beautiful view of the city . The hotel is new so room style and facilities are modern and very nice designed. We've had wonderful time staying here. Definitely will stay here again when we travel to Nha Trang next time.
area: Tân Lập,Nha Trang - View on map

name: Starcity Bayfront Nha Trang Hotel
detail: The staff were friendly, the breakfast was amazing, varied and delicious. Great view of the beach in the mornings. The gym was great, again facing the beach front. However no music, just a Tv. The room was stunning, plushy bed, all amenities expected from a 4/5* including slippers, robe and fresh towels daily. Fridge, mini bar and room service with wide range of food available. It is the main hotel on the strip and right opposite from the sailing club, the hippest beach club in nha trang. Lots to eat close by. Everything is within walking distance. Dong, one of the reception staff turned up 2 hours early to his shift so he could help my brother in law get his phone fixed by a dodgy street vendor who tried to swap his iphone interior with a blocked phone. Don't trust anyone else there! Some of the rudest people we met, service without a smile in nha trang but as soon as we enter the hotel it's smiles and hello from every staff member we pass by. Definitely recommend this!!
area: Loc Tho,Nha Trang - View on map
